HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

40class SingCancellation
41{
42private:
43 int commonNodes;
44 Triangle* tPtr1;
45 Triangle* tPtr2;
46 int nQuadrature;
47 double(*xQuadrature)[2];
48 double* wQuadrature;
49 std::vector<double> w;
50
52 std::vector<std::vector<double>> pointsMap1;
54 std::vector<std::vector<double>> pointsMap2;
55
56public:
74 SingCancellation(int commonNodes, Triangle* tPtr1, Triangle* tPtr2,
75 int nQuadrature, double(*xQuadrature)[2], double* wQuadrature);
76
78 ~SingCancellation();
79
90 void commonVertex();
91
102 void commonEdge();
103
113 void commonFacet();
114
127 std::vector<int> getPermutation(int shift);
128
137 std::vector<std::vector<double>> getPointsMap(int triangleIndex) {
138 if (triangleIndex == 0) {
139 return pointsMap1;
140 } else if (triangleIndex == 1) {
141 return pointsMap2;
142 } else {
143 throw std::invalid_argument("Invalid triangle index. Use 1 or 2.");
144 }
145 }
146
151 std::vector<double> getWeights() { return w; }
152
171 void writeMatlabMatrixToTxt(const std::string &filename,
172 const std::string &varname,
173 const std::string &component,
174 const std::vector<std::vector<double>> &V,
175 int size, int prec = 6);
176
185 void writeMatlabVectorToTxt(const std::string &filename, const std::string &varname,
186 const std::vector<double> &w, int prec = 6);
187};
188
